tasks.label: Graded assignment — 90% done, submit when finished

memory.summary: The assignment is almost done and I have plenty of time, so I'll just finish it quickly without worrying about anything else right now.
I just missed the deadline by a few minutes while distracted, and now I feel stressed about telling my professor without ruining our good relationship.

desires: Avoid the awkward confrontation with the professor about being late; I just need them to accept the work without me having to explain or admit fault.
Finish this assignment immediately so I can stop feeling that knot of anxiety in my chest and go hang out with the cohort instead of staring at the screen.
Not feel like a failure today; if I just submit it now, maybe the missed deadline won't actually matter for our relationship.

goals.description: Hit submit on the assignment right now just to make the 'failing' feeling stop so I can finally breathe and get back to the group chat.
goals.rationale: My affiliation value (0.5) is screaming that if I don't submit, Prof Assignment will think I'm incompetent, which ruins our relationship. My impulsive nature means I can't handle the friction of finishing this last 5% or explaining why I'm late; I just need the threat gone immediately to regulate my anxiety and return to my primary source of safety: the cohort.

goals.description: Message the group chat saying 'Made it!' and jump into the coffee break with cohort_3 immediately after submission.
goals.rationale: I need that social connection to feel normal again, but I am too exhausted from sleep debt and procrastination bias to plan anything beyond the immediate relief of escaping the screen. I'll only do this once the professor's shadow is gone.

agent.last_reasoning: I need to finish the last 5% before the LMS closes in 10 mins. If I wait, prof_assignment will think I'm incompetent and ruin our trust. Submitting now stops the panic so I can finally text cohort_3 about the coffee break.

goals.description: Submit the assignment now so I can stop feeling like I'm failing Prof Assignment and get back to the group chat.
goals.rationale: My affiliation value (0.5) makes me terrified of disappointing my professor, and my impulsive nature means I can't handle the friction of finishing this 'hard' task right now. The deadline is in 28 minutes, so the risk of looking slacking is immediate, but I want to finish as fast as possible just to escape.

goals.description: Jump into the coffee break with cohort_3 immediately after submitting.
goals.rationale: I need that social connection to regulate my stress, but I'm too exhausted (sleep debt + procrastination bias) to plan anything beyond the immediate relief of the group chat. I'll only do this once the threat of the professor is gone.

desires: Finish this assignment just enough so I don't look slacking to Prof Assignment before they check in.
Get back to the group chat/coffee break with cohort_3 immediately instead of dealing with any more hard thinking.
Not feel that creeping exhaustion hit me harder later tonight when I actually have to sleep.
